message:
Include Claude plugin pages in generated sitemap

Reorder generate scripts so generate:claude-plugins runs before
generate:docs-map, ensuring the sitemap includes individual plugin
pages. Update generate-docs-map.mjs to walk the reference/claude-plugins/
directory and add plugins to the sitemap output.

files.patch:
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
     "build": "astro build",
     "preview": "astro preview",
     "astro": "astro",
-    "generate": "pnpm generate:changelog && pnpm generate:docs-map && pnpm generate:claude-plugins",
+    "generate": "pnpm generate:changelog && pnpm generate:claude-plugins && pnpm generate:docs-map",
     "generate:changelog": "node scripts/sync-changelog.mjs",
     "generate:claude-plugins": "node scripts/sync-claude-plugins.mjs",
     "generate:docs-map": "node scripts/generate-docs-map.mjs",
